title: Urostachys elongatus
taxonomy: Urostachys elongatus is classified as a species of fern in the family Dasypogonaceae. It belongs to the genus Urostachys and is a type of climbing or scrambling fern. The Dasypogonaceae family is a group of ferns that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Urostachys elongatus is native to Australia and New Guinea.
